title: LLM Pricing Data Schema
description: Schema for LLM API pricing data (currency-keyed format v4.0)

Model.description: Pricing keyed by currency code (e.g. USD, CNY). Each key holds the canonical price from the highest-priority official source for that currency.

CurrencyPricing.description: Pricing for a model in a specific currency, from the highest-priority official source.

tiered_pricing.description: Tiered pricing (e.g. price differs by context length)

image_output_price.description: Flat fee per generated output image, in USD (for image generation models). E.g. $0.039/image for Gemini Flash Image.

cache_read_input_price.description: Price for reading from cache per 1M tokens

cache_creation_input_price.description: Price for creating cache entry per 1M tokens

input_price.description: Batch API input price per 1M tokens

output_price.description: Batch API output price per 1M tokens

tier_start.description: Inclusive start of token range for this tier

tier_end.description: Exclusive end of token range (omitted for the last/open-ended tier)

input_price.description: Input price per 1M tokens for this tier

output_price.description: Output price per 1M tokens for this tier
